Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-31 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's ranking at position #1 with an exceptional composite score of 95.2, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 1,494% over 10 years and consistent outperformance versus SPY by 1,278 percentage points over the same period. The ticker shows textbook momentum characteristics with all four moving average filters passing, a "clean" momentum signal, and a "strong_buy" rating, though its 1.5x volatility ratio indicates meaningfully higher risk. CLMT ranks second with a 168% 1-year return and 506% 5-year return, both exceeding LINC on shorter timeframes, but it exhibits a critical structural weakness: a -54.81% underperformance versus SPY over 10 years (versus LINC's +1,278%), suggesting CLMT's gains are recent-cycle specific rather than secular. Both stocks pass all SMA filters and show strong near-term momentum, but LINC's multi-decade outperformance across all benchmark comparisons (SPY, QQQ, IAU) marks it as a more sustained trend, while CLMT's deteriorating 10-year ratio (0.32x) signals deceleration in long-term relative strength.
